title: Quest Alliance Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Quest Alliance Capital India is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Quest Alliance Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Chennai-based team.

About Quest Alliance Capital India:
Quest Alliance Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Quest Alliance Capital India!
